creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #4)

This works to a certain point, but some of those teams are so that              
no member sees the urge or competence to act and approve and so PRs             
collect dust, waiting for an approval that never comes.                         
                                                                                
> What you are saying is that while not knowing much about Python, I can 
> add myself to the python group, and then commit updates to lang/python 
> without any review or approval.

What I'm saying is that Dmitry knows enough about ports that
a simple change like the one he suggested will cause no harm.
